titleStmt.title: SII 8.16: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 16. (A.R. No. 430 of 1902). ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE IN THE VALMIKANATHA TEMPLE AT SEYYUR, MADURANTAKAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . virame tuṇaiyākavun tiyākame yaṇiyākavuñ ceṅko locci kkaruṅkali kaṭin tu kūṭalcaṅkamattu hā(ā)havamallaṉai yañcuvittu vikkalaṉaiyuñ ciṅkaṇaṉaiyum Uṭaipuṟaṅ kaṇṭu maṟṟavaṉ ma hāde viyoṭum vastu vāhanaṅ kaik(k)koṇṭu Iraṇṭāmvicaiyiluṅ kuṟitta kaḷattu hāhavamallaṉai yañcuvittut tan muṉṉavar viratamuṭittu veṅkaināṭu miṭṭaruḷi vijaiyā- [ bhiṣe kam paṇṇi] virasiṁ hāsa nattu Ulakamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟirun=ta- ruḷiya kovirājakesaripanmarā
ṉa Uṭaiyār śrīvirarājentrade varkku yāṇṭu Añcāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattuc cempūrkkoṭṭattup puṟaiyūrnāṭṭuc ceyyūrāṉa jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻanallūrp puṟṟiṭaṅkoṇṭaruḷiṉa ma hāde varkku se nāpatimārāyaṉ maturāntakanāṉa rājarāja nayapālaneṉ Ittevarkku pūrvāṇhasan=ti Oṉṟiṉukkut tiruvamurtari(y)ci nānāḻikkum kaṟiyamurtukkum neyThe letter y is written below the line.yamurtukkum Aṭaikkāyamurtukkum sa ntiviḷakku Āṟukkum Āka san=ti Oṉṟiṉukku nellup patakku muṉṉāḻikku Innāṭṭu Eṉ kāṇi ceyyūrāṉa virarājentra nallūr
nirnilattu Iṟaiyiliyāka viṭṭa nilattukkuk kiḻpāṟkellai tiraiyacekaraṉ ceṟuvukkum palliṟuppāṉkarampaikkum meṟkum vaṭapāṟkellai vaḷavatarayaṉceṟuvukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai palliṟuppāṉkarampaiykkum tillampaḷḷittukkup pāyum vāykkālukku vaṭakku taṭi Iraṇṭukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai nikarilicoḻavatiyiṉ kiḻiṉ taṭi muṉṟukkuk kiḻakkum Iṉṉāṟpālellaik kuḷḷum naṭuvu kiṇaṟu Akappaṭa caṭaiyaṉceṟuvu taṭi Iraṇṭināl pati
neṇcāṇkolālk kuḻi Eḻunūṟṟaṟupattiraṇṭe mākāṇiyum Ittevarkku Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṟaiyiḻicci kal veṭṭuvittuk kuṭutteṉ se nāpati mārāyaṉ maturān=ta kanāṉa rājarāja nayapālaneṉ . Ittaṉmam IṟakkuvāThe record is incomplete; but only a small portion is wanting at the end.
Digital edition of SII 8.16 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
